## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm lint` all pass locally
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests (or explain why not needed)
- [ ] Docs updated if public API or behaviour changed
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
